meanings.definition: a small number (of something) dispersed haphazardly
examples: a sprinkling of grey at his temples

meanings.definition: the physical process in which particles are deflected haphazardly as a result of collisions
a light shower that falls in some locations and not others nearby
to cause to separate and go in different directions
examples: She waved her hand and scattered the crowds
The children scattered in all directions when the teacher approached
He scattered gun powder under the wagon

meanings.definition: strew or distribute over an area
examples: He spread fertilizer over the lawn
